raw_text: cv, omar khalil gómez november 2016 name and forename: omar khalil gómez id: 50.229.082a date and birthplace: 13/12/1989 at madrid nationality: spanish address: c/ antonio lópez, 67 4 -12* b telephone/mobile number: (+34) 915601074 / (+34) 650274465 email: omarkg890 gmail.com education bachelor of science degree in computer engineering with major in computer science at universidad carlos iii of leganés, madrid, completed in 2015. beneficiary of the erasmus scholarship in 2012/2013 at universita degli studi di pisa with english and italian courses. gce advanced level at colegio sagrado corazón p.p. capuchinos in madrid, 2005 - 2007. gcse completed at colegio sagrado corazón p.p. capuchinos in madrid, 2002 - 2005. professional experience junior systems engineer, at indra sistemas s.a. (full-time) actively contributing at sesar (single european sky atm research) department on several projects, from april 2015 to october 2016: - sesari b.04.04 "delineation of the controller working position": design and development of service interfaces for controller working positions, participation in the integration and test of the service interfaces in atc (air traffic control) systems. - sesar2020 pj .16 "workstation, controller productivity": quality control of the proposal elaborated to address the project's call launched by the european commission under the horizon 2020 framework. - sesar1 b.04.03 "development of the high level logical system architecture and the technical system architecture": delivery of service allocation reports for atm (air traffic management) services. - sesar2020 pj .17 "swim technical infrastructure": internal preparation for solution pj-17-01 related to the swim technology infrastructure in air ground communications. systems engineer trainee at indra sistemas s.a. (part-time) providing technical support at sesar (single european sky atm research) department on several sesari projects, from january 2014 to april 2015: page of 3 cv, omar khalil gómez november 2016 - b.04.03 "development of the high level logical system architecture and the technical system architecture": contribution to sesar 1 services architecting process. - 14.01.03 "swim design": modelling activities to represent swim technical infrastructure. - intensive general english course at london learning centre in london, upper- intermediate level (b2 according to the common european framework) [2010]. - intensive general english course at mayfair school of english in london, upper- intermediate level (b2 according to the common european framework) [2008]. e italian, upper-intermediate level. related education: page 2 of 3 cv, omar khalil gómez november 2016 -
